team.name: Selina Fan
team.bio: Selina founded Inpetto after 7 years leading brand and content strategy at agencies across Melbourne and Shanghai. She's obsessed with the intersection of creativity and culture — and building brands that actually mean something on social.

team.name: Chloe Wang
team.bio: Chloe manages influencer partnerships and community engagement across all client accounts. She's built relationships with 300+ creators in lifestyle, food, beauty, and fitness verticals across Australia.

team.name: Kevin Chen
team.bio: Kevin leads content production and strategy at Inpetto — overseeing video, photography, and campaign direction. Before Inpetto, he spent 4 years at a top Melbourne creative agency working with DTC and hospitality brands.

team.name: Michelle Lin
team.bio: Michelle manages paid social across Meta and TikTok for all Inpetto clients. She's managed over $1.5M in ad spend and has a sharp eye for the creative angles that actually convert.
